objectives: Separate primary evidence from summaries and claims.
Create page, row, timestamp, archive-member or commit coordinates.
Identify duplicates, contradictions, supersession and inaccessible gaps.
Apply privacy, licence and credential boundaries.
sandbox: Use synthetic or public test sources only.
supervised_tasks: Register one document and one repository source.
Create an extraction ledger with coordinates.
Mark one duplicate and one contradiction.
Demonstrate rollback of derived index entries.
refresher: 12 months or after material parser/policy change
